query:
-- EAST region (March 19): duke/siena, ohio_st/tcu, louisville/south_florida, michigan_st/n_dakota_st
-- SOUTH region (March 19): vanderbilt/mcneese_st, nebraska/troy, north_carolina/vcu, illinois/penn, st_marys/texas_a_and_m, houston/idaho
UPDATE games SET gameDate = '2026-03-19'
WHERE id IN (1830082, 1830083, 1830084, 1830085, 1830107, 1830109, 1830110, 1830111, 1830112, 1830113)
AND sport = 'NCAAM';
